dc_description_s: This data represents zoning in Lafayette County, Wisconsin in 2026 and includes the layers 'LAFAYETTE_GENERAL_2026' and 'LAFAYETTE_SHORELAND_2026'. [GENERAL: Participating towns include: Argyle, Belmont, Elk Grove, Fayette, Gratiot, Kendall, Lamont, Monticello, Shullsburg, Wayne, & Wiota.Zoning Districts are as follows:A-1 Working Lands Initiative (Farmland Preservation Eligibility)A-2 Ag LandsRR Rural ResidentialR-1 Single Family ResidentialR-2 Multi Family Residential (Condo)R-3 Mobile Home Park or Multi Unit ResidentialB-1 Rural BusinessC-1 Commercial BusinessM-1 Light IndustrialM-2 Heavy IndustrialCFR Conservation, Forestry, and Recreation]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
